name: Dr. Luke

acts.description: Kesha's allegations of rape, sexual assault, and psychological abuse over a decade-long professional relationship
Defamation lawsuit against Kesha, weaponizing legal system to silence accuser

behavior_summary: Kesha sued Dr. Luke for sexual assault, rape, and emotional abuse. He counter-sued for defamation. After years of legal battles, Kesha dropped her assault claims to settle. He has denied all allegations and continues to produce hit records.

art.summary: One of the most commercially successful pop producers of the 2000s and 2010s, responsible for dozens of #1 hits.

verdict.blurb: His accuser spent nearly a decade in court trying to escape his label and his shadow. He is still making hits. The music industry has decided that's fine.
